title: HOZELOCK - Micro Reel 10m : Ideal for patios, balconies and small gardens, compact and practical "Click & Go" design, a lightweight small bore hose, 1 hose nozzle, ready to use [2427 0000]
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
description: From the manufacturer Micro Reel Ideal for smaller gardens or limited outdoor spaces, the Micro Reel combines practicality with user-friendly features, ensuring efficient watering with minimal fuss. Micro Reel Introducing the Hozelock Micro Reel, the perfect solution for effortless watering in compact spaces. Ideal for patios, small gardens, and balconies, this reel simplifies plant care with its innovative ‘click & go’ functionality. The easy-to-use rotating drum and winding handle ensure smooth unwinding and rewinding of the hose without any tangling. Simply clip the nozzle in place, connect the reel to the tap, and start watering as you walk—making the entire process hassle-free. Equipped with a practical 10m hose, the Micro Reel allows you to water your plants efficiently without fully extending the hose. Just unwind the needed length for the task at hand. Its compact design allows for easy storage in small spaces, whether in a cupboard, on a shed shelf, or next to the tap, keeping your outdoor area tidy and organised. The Hozelock Micro Reel is designed to make watering quick, simple, and enjoyable, providing you with a reliable and space-saving solution for your gardening needs. Key benefits include: Complete Kit: Includes a 10m hose and fittings for quick and easy setup. Rotating Drum: Low-profile handle ensures tangle-free winding and unwinding of hose. ‘Click & Go’ Convenience: Click connector onto the tap and unwind as you move for easy use. Adjustable Length: Water at any length without fully unwinding the hose for added flexibility. Space-Saving Design: Neatly store the reel near the tap or stow away for a tidy space. Micro Reel Key Features ‘Click & Go’ Clip the nozzle into place, ‘click’ the connector onto the tap, and start walking to unwind the hose. When ready, simply unclip the nozzle to begin watering. Easy Rewind The rotating drum and winding handle make unwinding and rewinding the hose effortless—no tangles. Water at any Length The Micro Reel offers 10m of hose, giving you flexibility to unwind just the length you need. Neat and Tidy Compact size makes it perfect for storing in cupboards, on shed shelves, or by the tap.
